description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mac-linux-ci that runs on push and pull request events. Use a concurrency strategy to cancel in-progress runs when a new run is queued. Define two jobs, ubuntu and mac, each using a reusable workflow generic_ci.yml with different matrix strategies for compiler, build, and OS. For ubuntu, use a matrix of gcc and clang compilers, Release and Debug builds, and ubuntu-20.04 OS. For mac, use a matrix of Release and Debug builds on macos-11 with clang compiler.
